linkedin.profile.headline: Gen AI / Decentralization / System Design / Team Building
linkedin.profile.about: Located in Austin and interested in machine learning applications, system design, compelling user experiences, social coordination, and building teams.

experiences.description:
Building the user-owned data network where data privacy, generative AI, and web3 intersect.

* R&D for decentralized consensus, zero-knowledge data validation
* Created the Vana Personal Server desktop application for hosting personal data with local models: https://github.com/vana-com/personal-server
* Data validation, anti-fraud components, and incentives in partnership with the first-ever data DAO, rdatadata.org
* Tech lead for user-data-driven, consumer digital persona applications involving extensive R&D in AI engineering
* Core contributor of the Vana gen AI user-portrait experience with over one million users, portrait.vana.com

Led and supported new market initiatives at DailyPay with technical discovery, solution design, feature implementation, and team building. Worked closely with product and engineering leadership on new market product strategies.

  •  Cultivated an engaged, high-throughput, remote API team by prioritizing key business metrics, defining a shared vision, encouraging ownership, and building workflows to reduce friction in these areas.
  •  Designed a RESTful API and authored a formal specification to expedite a pilot deal and core product API proof-of-concept.
  •  Led the API product from proof-of-concept to successful launch, built within the core DailyPay Ruby on Rails app.
  •  Built an internal API documentation site with OpenAPI, Slate and S3.
  •  Coached UX-first RESTful API design via OpenAPI and JSON Schema.
  •  Designed and implemented API production support policies, observability instrumentation, and reporting that revealed preexisting failures in core product user experiences.
  •  Owned technical discovery for a new consumer banking card known as Friday. This spanned assessing technical feasibility, vendor implementation and integration proof-of-concepts, and architecture.
  •  Authored an API permissions solution design to address permutations of API resources and clients.
  •  Designed & facilitated numerous interviews that both built an effective API team and brought a Belfast engineering team online.
  •  Built a client-facing payroll anomaly report that spanned a ReactJS client, GraphQL backend, and data science API integration, to minimize accounting errors and financial risk.

Engineering lead for job posting promotions and the billing user experience. This role emphasized scoping engineering tasks, rapid experimentation, and mentoring engineers.

  •  Led and mentored a team of new engineers to rapidly enable autonomy and product ownership.
  •  Increased company revenue through the development of product promotions and enhancements, implemented as split test experiments with the Indeed Proctor framework, across a ReactJS front-end and Java backend.
  •  Assumed ownership of billing pages for the job posting product. Established production monitoring and alerting, comprehensive automated testing, and continuous deployment.
  •  Scoped and oversaw the front-end engineering work for the implementation of a new pricing model that spanned multiple projects and teams.

Led a front-end infrastructure team and cross-team system design, roadmap-building, prioritization, and mentoring.

  •  Reduced client implementation time by 10x and improved client satisfaction by leading an engineering team through the invention of a UI platform for highly flexible product customizations.
  •  Unified all JavaScript products under a single loading mechanism and asset deployment pipeline. This   •  simplified client implementations and front-end development.
  •  Enabled the product team to deliver a demonstrably valuable ecommerce Review Highlights product by building A/B testing capabilities and advocating for data-driven innovation.
  •  Automated product configuration schema management by building a customizable JSON editor to support many non-technical users.
  •  Modernized the client-facing product configuration UI by building a Backbone application dynamically rendered from JSON to minimize maintenance requirements as configuration schemas evolve.

Individual contributor and tech lead for greenfield business tools (e.g. vendor and accounting portals), and later consumer-facing heb.com.

  •  Improved heb.com build execution by 20x by designing a Gradle plugin for Oracle ATG E-commerce projects, migrating from Ant.
  •  Fostered healthy engineering culture: implemented peer code reviews, managed CVS to Git transition, modernized tech stacks, tech lead.

education.degree: B.S., B.A., Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics
